reasoning: OpenAI defines AGI as a highly autonomous system that outperforms humans at most economically valuable work. In 2024, OpenAI was considered to be around Level 2 (Reasoners) on their 5-level path to AGI. Progressing all the way to AGI by the end of 2025 is technologically extremely ambitious. Furthermore, there is a massive structural disincentive for OpenAI to announce AGI: under their contract with Microsoft, reaching AGI would exclude their new models from Microsoft's commercial IP licenses. This creates a high evidentiary and legal bar for any formal announcement. Given the short timeline and these massive legal/financial implications, the likelihood of an official AGI announcement in 2025 is very low.
